prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年北京工业大学在天津市综合类最低录取位次分别为约4777名、4913名、4335名、7001名、4287名。2024年因专业组划分调整出现位次大幅后移（7001名），但2025年迅速回升至4287名，创近五年最佳水平，显示该校在天津的报考热度回升明显。2025年基准位次为4287名；该校在天津市综合类招生计划从2021年8人逐步扩至2022年9人、2023年9人、2024年11人、2025年11人。根据2026年招生计划文件，2026年计划扩至13人，较2025年增加2人，扩招幅度约18.2%。扩招意味着投放名额增加，理论上会缓解竞争压力。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 北京工业大学为211工程、双一流建设高校，理工类。软科中国大学排名近年分别为：2021年第59名、2022年第63名、2023年第63名、2024年第66名、2025年第72名、2026年第65名。2026年排名回升至65名，较2025年上升7位，表明学校综合实力稳中有升，对考生吸引力有所增强；声誉方面，北京工业大学在2022年高考周期内因拟录取研究生不当言论事件出现偏负面舆情，2026年周期内亦有类似事件，但整体影响范围有限，未形成大规模报考信心动摇。抖音热度排名第57位（较热），综合热度约55万，在211高校中处于中等偏上水平，反映考生关注度尚可。历史投档异常记录中未见北京工业大学出现断档或暴跌信号，录取走势相对平稳；第五轮学科评估中，北京工业大学拥有环境科学与工程A、光学工程A-、土木工程A-、材料科学与工程A-、软件工程A-等5个A类学科。其中软件工程与招生专业中的计算机类、人工智能高度相关，环境科学与工程与新能源材料方向有交叉，优势学科对相关专业报考有正向拉动作用。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 该校在天津招生专业以计算机科学与技术、人工智能（实验班）、电子信息工程（实验班）、统计学、新能源材料与器件为主。其中计算机类、电子信息/通信类专业社会热度持续高热推荐，电气工程及其自动化亦为高热推荐，这些热门专业有助于吸引高分考生报考。新能源材料与器件虽属材料大类（传统劝退方向），但绿色新质班定位提升了吸引力。天津市2026年普通高考考生总数约82000人，较2025年71938人增长约14%，考生规模扩大意味着整体竞争加剧。；北京工业大学位于北京市，与天津市毗邻，地理位置优越，对天津考生具有天然的地域吸引力。作为北京市属唯一的211高校，其在京外招生名额有限，天津考生报考意愿较强。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合以上因素：2025年基准位次4287名为近年高位，2026年扩招18.2%（13人 vs 11人）按供需弹性计算使基准位次上移至约4755名；叠加天津市考生总数增长约14%带来的竞争加剧效应，以及软科排名回升、热门专业集聚等正向因素，预计2026年最低录取位次在4755名基础上小幅上移至约4775名。预测最低位次为4775名，波动区间4275–5275名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 计算机科学与技术
- 人工智能（实验班）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 电子信息工程（实验班）
- 统计学。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 新能源材料与器件（绿色新质班）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约4775名，区间4275–5275名。位次在区间中上段（优于4775名）可重点冲刺一档计算机科学与技术、人工智能（实验班）；位次在区间中段建议以二档电子信息工程、统计学为主力填报；位次在区间下段（接近5275名）可考虑三档新能源材料与器件作为保底，同时关注扩招带来的机会。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Beijing University of Technology in Tianjin's comprehensive category were approximately 4777, 4913, 4335, 7001, and 4287 respectively. In 2024, due to adjustments in major group divisions, the ranking significantly dropped to 7001, but quickly rebounded to 4287 in 2025, the best level in the past five years, indicating a notable recovery in application popularity in Tianjin. The baseline ranking for 2025 is 4287. The enrollment plan for comprehensive category in Tianjin gradually expanded from 8 students in 2021 to 9 in 2022, 9 in 2023, 11 in 2024, and 11 in 2025. According to the 2026 enrollment plan document, the plan is to expand to 13 students in 2026, an increase of 2 students compared to 2025, with an expansion rate of about 18.2%. Expansion means more slots are available, theoretically easing competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Beijing University of Technology is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university, focusing on science and engineering. Its recent rankings in the Soft Science China University Rankings are: 59th in 2021, 63rd in 2022, 63rd in 2023, 66th in 2024, 72nd in 2025, and 65th in 2026. The ranking rebounded to 65th in 2026, up 7 places from 2025, indicating a steady improvement in overall strength and increased attractiveness to applicants. In terms of reputation, during the 2022 college entrance examination cycle, there was a negative public opinion incident involving inappropriate remarks by a prospective graduate student, and a similar incident occurred in the 2026 cycle, but the overall impact was limited and did not cause widespread动摇 in application confidence. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 57th (relatively hot), with a comprehensive popularity of about 550,000, which is above average among 211 universities, reflecting moderate applicant attention. Historical admission anomaly records show no signs of gaps or sharp drops for Beijing University of Technology, with relatively stable admission trends. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Beijing University of Technology has 5 A-level disciplines: Environmental Science and Engineering (A), Optical Engineering (A-), Civil Engineering (A-), Materials Science and Engineering (A-), and Software Engineering (A-). Among these, Software Engineering is highly related to the enrollment majors of Computer Science and Artificial Intelligence, while Environmental Science and Engineering intersects with the direction of New Energy Materials, and these advantageous disciplines positively drive applications for related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Location
专业热度与地域.text: The university's enrollment majors in Tianjin mainly include Computer Science and Technology, Artificial Intelligence (Experimental Class), Electronic Information Engineering (Experimental Class), Statistics, and New Energy Materials and Devices. Among them, Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication majors are consistently highly recommended, and Electrical Engineering and Automation is also a high-recommendation major. These popular majors help attract high-scoring applicants. Although New Energy Materials and Devices falls under the broader materials category (traditionally discouraged), the positioning of the Green New Quality Class enhances its appeal. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Tianjin general college entrance examination is about 82,000, an increase of about 14% from 71,938 in 2025, meaning intensified overall competition. Beijing University of Technology is located in Beijing, adjacent to Tianjin, with a superior geographical location, naturally attracting Tianjin applicants. As the only 211 university under Beijing's jurisdiction, its enrollment quota outside Beijing is limited, so Tianjin applicants have a strong willingness to apply.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering all factors: the 2025 baseline ranking of 4287 is a recent high; the 18.2% enrollment expansion in 2026 (13 vs 11) shifts the baseline ranking upward to about 4755 based on supply-demand elasticity; combined with the intensified competition effect from an approximately 14% increase in Tianjin candidates, and positive factors such as the rebound in Soft Science ranking and concentration of popular majors, the minimum admission ranking for 2026 is expected to slightly move upward from 4755 to about 4775. The predicted minimum ranking is 4775, with a fluctuation range of 4275–5275.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Computer Science and Technology
- Artificial Intelligence (Experimental Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Electronic Information Engineering (Experimental Class)
- Statistics.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- New Energy Materials and Devices (Green New Quality Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking around 4775, range 4275–5275. Candidates with rankings in the upper part of the range (better than 4775) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 majors like Computer Science and Technology and Artificial Intelligence (Experimental Class); those in the middle of the range are advised to primarily apply for Tier 2 majors like Electronic Information Engineering and Statistics; those in the lower part of the range (close to 5275) may consider Tier 3 majors like New Energy Materials and Devices as a safety option, while also paying attention to opportunities brought by the enrollment expansion.
